channel.title: Naver Corporation — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Naver Corporation (naver).

item.title: CVE-2026-8148 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: NAVER MYBOX Explorer for Windows before 3.0.11.160 allows a local attacker to escalate privileges to NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM via registry manipulation due to improper privilege checks.

item.title: CVE-2026-1513 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: billboard.js before 3.18.0 allows an attacker to execute malicious JavaScript due to improper sanitization during chart option binding.

item.title: CVE-2026-23769 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ 👻
item.description: lucy-xss-filter before commit e5826c0 allows an attacker to execute malicious JavaScript due to improper sanitization caused by misconfigured default superset rule files.

item.title: CVE-2026-23768 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ 👻
item.description: lucy-xss-filter before commit 7c1de6d allows an attacker to induce server-side HEAD requests to arbitrary URLs when the ObjectSecurityListener or EmbedSecurityListener option is enabled and embed or object tags are used with a src attribute missing a…

item.title: CVE-2025-69235 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Whale browser before 4.35.351.12 allows an attacker to bypass the Same-Origin Policy in a sidebar environment.

item.title: CVE-2025-69234 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Whale browser before 4.35.351.12 allows an attacker to escape the iframe sandbox in a sidebar environment.

item.title: CVE-2025-62585 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Whale browser before 4.33.325.17 allows an attacker to bypass the Content Security Policy via a specific scheme in a dual-tab environment.

item.title: CVE-2025-62584 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Whale browser before 4.33.325.17 allows an attacker to bypass the Same-Origin Policy in a dual-tab environment.

item.title: CVE-2025-62583 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Whale Browser before 4.33.325.17 allows an attacker to escape the iframe sandbox in a dual-tab environment.

item.title: CVE-2025-58323 · 7.7 HIGH
item.description: NAVER MYBOX Explorer for Windows before 3.0.8.133 allows a local attacker to escalate privileges to NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM by executing arbitrary files due to improper privilege checks.

item.title: CVE-2025-58322 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: NAVER MYBOX Explorer for Windows before 3.0.8.133 allows a local attacker to escalate privileges to NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM by invoking arbitrary DLLs due to improper privilege checks.

item.title: CVE-2025-53600 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Whale browser before 4.32.315.22 allow an attacker to bypass the Same-Origin Policy in a dual-tab environment.

item.title: CVE-2025-53599 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Whale browser for iOS before 3.9.1.4206 allow an attacker to execute malicious scripts in the browser via a crafted javascript scheme.

item.title: CVE-2025-49223 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: billboard.js before 3.15.1 was discovered to contain a prototype pollution via the function generate, which could allow attackers to execute arbitrary code or cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via injecting arbitrary properties.

item.title: CVE-2024-50583 · 6.3 MEDIUM
item.description: Whale browser Installer before 3.1.0.0 allows an attacker to execute a malicious DLL in the user environment due to improper permission settings.

item.title: CVE-2024-40618 · 9.6 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Whale browser before 3.26.244.21 allows an attacker to execute malicious JavaScript due to improper sanitization when processing a built-in extension.

item.title: CVE-2024-28216 · 5.4 MEDIUM
item.description: nGrinder before 3.5.9 allows an attacker to obtain the results of webhook requests due to lack of access control, which could be the cause of information disclosure and limited Server-Side Request Forgery.

item.title: CVE-2024-28215 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: nGrinder before 3.5.9 allows an attacker to create or update webhook configuration due to lack of access control, which could be the cause of information disclosure and limited Server-Side Request Forgery.

item.title: CVE-2024-28214 · 2.7 LOW
item.description: nGrinder before 3.5.9 allows to set delay without limitation, which could be the cause of Denial of Service by remote attacker.

item.title: CVE-2024-28213 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: nGrinder before 3.5.9 allows to accept serialized Java objects from unauthenticated users, which could allow remote attacker to execute arbitrary code via unsafe Java objects deserialization.

item.title: CVE-2024-28212 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: nGrinder before 3.5.9 uses old version of SnakeYAML, which could allow remote attacker to execute arbitrary code via unsafe deserialization.

item.title: CVE-2024-28211 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: nGrinder before 3.5.9 allows connection to malicious JMX/RMI server by default, which could be the cause of executing arbitrary code via RMI registry by remote attacker.

item.title: CVE-2023-25632
item.description: The Android Mobile Whale browser app before 3.0.1.2 allows the attacker to bypass its browser unlock function via 'Open in Whale' feature.

item.title: CVE-2020-9754
item.description: NAVER Whale browser mobile app before 1.10.6.2 allows the attacker to bypass its browser unlock function via incognito mode.

item.title: CVE-2022-24077
item.description: Naver Cloud Explorer Beta allows the attacker to execute arbitrary code as System privilege via malicious DLL injection.

item.title: CVE-2022-24075
item.description: Whale browser before 3.12.129.18 allowed extensions to replace JavaScript files of the HWP viewer website which could access to local HWP files. When the HWP files were opened, the replaced script could read the files.

item.title: CVE-2022-24074
item.description: Whale Bridge, a default extension in Whale browser before 3.12.129.18, allowed to receive any SendMessage request from the content script itself that could lead to controlling Whale Bridge if the rendering process compromises.

item.title: CVE-2022-24073
item.description: The Web Request API in Whale browser before 3.12.129.18 allowed to deny access to the extension store or redirect to any URL when users access the store.

item.title: CVE-2022-24072
item.description: The devtools API in Whale browser before 3.12.129.18 allowed extension developers to inject arbitrary JavaScript into the extension store web page via devtools.inspectedWindow, leading to extensions downloading and uploading when users open the devel…

item.title: CVE-2022-24071
item.description: A Built-in extension in Whale browser before 3.12.129.46 allows attackers to compromise the rendering process which could lead to controlling browser internal APIs.

item.title: CVE-2021-33593
item.description: Whale browser for iOS before 1.14.0 has an inconsistent user interface issue that allows an attacker to obfuscate the address bar which may lead to address bar spoofing.

item.title: CVE-2021-33592
item.description: NAVER Toolbar before 4.0.30.323 allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted upgrade.xml file. Special characters in filename parameter can be the cause of bypassing code signing check function.

item.title: CVE-2021-33591
item.description: An exposed remote debugging port in Naver Comic Viewer prior to 1.0.15.0 allowed a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code via a crafted HTML page.

item.title: CVE-2020-9753
item.description: Whale Browser Installer before 1.2.0.5 versions don't support signature verification for Flash installer.

item.title: CVE-2020-9752
item.description: Naver Cloud Explorer before 2.2.2.11 allows the attacker can move a local file in any path on the filesystem as a system privilege through its named pipe.

item.title: CVE-2020-9751
item.description: Naver Cloud Explorer before 2.2.2.11 allows the system to download an arbitrary file from the attacker's server and execute it during the upgrade.

item.title: CVE-2019-13157
item.description: nsGreen.dll in Naver Vaccine 2.1.4 allows remote attackers to overwrite arbitary files via directory traversal sequences in a filename within nsz archive.

item.title: CVE-2019-13156
item.description: NDrive(1.2.2).sys in Naver Cloud Explorer has a stack-based buffer overflow, which allows attackers to cause a denial of service when reading data from IOCTL handle.

item.title: CVE-2018-12449
item.description: The Whale browser installer 0.4.3.0 and earlier versions allows DLL hijacking.

item.title: CVE-2018-12448
item.description: Whale Browser before 1.3.48.4 displays no URL information but only a title of a web page on the browser's address bar when visiting a non-http page, which allows an attacker to display a malicious web page with a fake domain name.
